meta.title: Actual Budget Mobile — Privacy-first budgeting for iOS
meta.description: Actual Budget for iPhone. Your financial data stays on your device — no subscriptions, no data mining, no cloud required. Join the waitlist.

hero.title: Your budget, your pocket.
hero.subtitle: Budget on your phone without handing your data to anyone. Offline-first, conflict-free sync, and fully open source.

features.heading: Your data belongs to you. Full stop.

localFirst.title: Local-first
localFirst.description: Your financial data stays on your device. No third-party servers, no data mining. Works offline, loads instantly, and you're never locked out of your own money.

sync.title: Real-time Sync
sync.description: Changes sync automatically across all your devices — even when you're offline. No conflicts, no duplicates, no lost transactions.

envelope.title: Envelope Budgeting
envelope.description: Give every dollar a job. Zero-based budgeting means you assign every dollar before you spend it — so nothing slips through the cracks.

privacy.title: End-to-End Encrypted
privacy.description: You own your data — no one else can read it, not even us. AES-256-GCM encryption protects everything in transit. Self-host your server or run fully local.

step1.title: Connect
step1.description: Connect to your Actual Budget server, or skip it and run fully local.

step2.title: Organize
step2.description: Set up your accounts, categories, and budgets. Already using Actual? Your data imports automatically.

step3.title: Track
step3.description: Log transactions wherever you are. Your budget stays in sync across every device — in real time.

screenshots.heading: Designed for iOS
screenshots.subtitle: A native iPhone experience, not a ported web app.
screenshots.compat: Fully compatible with your Actual Budget server

waitlist.heading: Limited spots in beta
waitlist.subtitle: Join the TestFlight beta and help shape the app before it launches. We review requests and send invites in batches.
waitlist.success: You're in. We'll be in touch.
waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
waitlist.invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
waitlist.trustLine: One email per batch. No marketing, no tracking.

items.question: When will the app launch?
items.answer: The app is in active beta on TestFlight right now. Join the list and we'll send you an invite when the next batch opens.

items.question: Is it free?
items.answer: Yes! Actual Budget Mobile is free and open source. You can self-host your own Actual Budget server or use the app in fully offline, local-only mode — no server needed.

items.question: Does it work with my existing Actual Budget data?
items.answer: Absolutely. The app connects directly to any Actual Budget server and syncs your existing accounts, categories, budgets, and transactions.

items.question: What about Android?
items.answer: iOS first. Android is on the roadmap — we want to nail the iOS experience first, then bring it to Android.

items.question: Is my financial data safe?
items.answer: Your data never leaves your device unless you choose to sync. When syncing, data is protected with AES-256-GCM end-to-end encryption. No third parties can access your information.

items.question: Do I need a server?
items.answer: No. The app works fully offline in local-only mode. A server is only needed if you want to sync data across multiple devices.

comparison.heading: Other budgeting apps can't say this.
comparison.subtitle: YNAB costs $109/year. Copilot costs $95/year. Actual Mobile is free, open source, and your data never leaves your device.
